channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Launches Largest Drone Attack of the War on Kyiv
item.description: Russia fired hundreds of drones at Kyiv in what officials call the largest aerial assault since the invasion began, flattening residential buildings and killing at least 10 people across Ukraine.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇰🇪 Macron Faces Backlash in Kenya Over Africa Investment Push
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron announced a €23 billion investment package for Africa at the Kenya summit, but faced protests and criticism over Frances continued influence in former colonies.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 Chinas Xi Warns Trump on Taiwan at Beijing Summit
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping issued a subtle but clear warning on Taiwan during the Trump-Xi summit in Beijing, while both leaders agreed on cooperation regarding the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Rescuers Pull Bodies From Kyiv Rubble After Massive Russian Attack
item.description: Emergency workers recovered bodies from the ruins of a flattened apartment block in Kyiv after Russia unleashed one of its largest drone barrages of the war.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 Five Key Takeaways From Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing
item.description: The Trump-Xi summit covered Taiwan, Iran, trade, AI chips, and strategic relations with CNBC analyzing the five major outcomes from the historic Beijing meeting.

item.title: 🇭🇺 Hungary Summons Russian Ambassador Over Drone Intrusion
item.description: Hungary summoned the Russian ambassador after a drone attack entered its airspace during Russias massive aerial campaign against Ukraine.

item.title: 🇺🇦 UN Aid Convoy Hit by Drone Strikes in Ukraines Kherson
item.description: A UN humanitarian aid convoy was struck by drones in Kherson region, highlighting the dangers facing civilian assistance operations.

item.title: 🌍 India Says Emerging Nations Eye BRICS Grouping Stability
item.description: India stated that emerging nations are looking to BRICS for stability as the grouping meets amid the Iran-Israel conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran-UAE Clash at BRICS Foreign Ministers Meeting
item.description: Tensions surfaced between Iran and UAE at the BRICS foreign ministers meeting in China, reflecting regional divisions over the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan Calls for No Surprises in Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: Taiwan urged for no surprises from the Trump-Xi summit and called on China to end military pressure as the leaders meet in Beijing.

item.title: 🇮🇶 Iraqi Parliament Approves Partial Government Led by PM Zaidi
item.description: Iraqs parliament approved a partial government under Prime Minister Zaidi amid ongoing regional tensions.

item.title: 🛢️ India Asks US for Russian Oil Waiver Extension Amid Iran War
item.description: India has requested the US to extend its waiver for Russian oil purchases as the Iran conflict impacts global energy markets.

item.title: 🇱🇻 Latvian Prime Minister Silina Resigns
item.description: Latvian Prime Minister Evika Silina announced her resignation, triggering political uncertainty in the Baltic nation.

item.title: 🛢️ Gazprom Astrakhan Gas Plant Halted After Drone Attack
item.description: Gazproms Astrakhan gas processing plant suspended motor fuel output after a drone attack on May 13.

item.title: ⛪ Pope Leo Decries European Military Spending as Betrayal of Diplomacy
item.description: Pope Leo XIV criticized Europes increased military spending, calling it a betrayal of diplomatic solutions to conflicts.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Ankara Summit to Mark New Chapter for Turkish-American Alliance Within NATO
item.description: Experts say the Ankara summit will strengthen Turkish-American relations within NATO amid evolving geopolitical dynamics.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russias Prison Population Falls as Convicts Sent to War
item.description: Russias prison population has significantly decreased as convicts are recruited and sent to fight in Ukraine.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Jerusalem Day March Features Chants of Death to Arabs
item.description: Jerusalem Day march featured extremist chants as Ben-Gvir raised an Israeli flag on the Temple Mount amid tensions.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Agrees to Buy 200 Boeing Jets, Trump Says
item.description: China has agreed to purchase 200 Boeing jets as part of the trade discussions during the Trump-Xi summit in Beijing.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Increased Drone Activity Near Ukrainian Nuclear Sites
item.description: Reports indicate increased drone activity near Ukrainian nuclear facilities, raising safety concerns.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanon Presses Israel on Cease-Fire in Washington Talks
item.description: Lebanese officials are pressing for a ceasefire with Israel during Washington negotiations.

item.title: 💰 Gold Edges Up on Weaker Dollar Ahead of Trump-Xi Talks
item.description: Gold prices rose slightly as the dollar weakened ahead of the Trump-Xi summit in Beijing.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Trump and Xi Set for Second Day of Talks After Taiwan Warning
item.description: Trump and Xi prepared for a second day of negotiations after Xi issued warnings on Taiwan during their summit.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Pope Leo Criticizes European Military Spending
item.description: Pope Leo XIV criticized European nations for prioritizing military spending over diplomatic solutions.

item.title: 🌍 BRICS Meeting Overshadowed by Iran-Israel War
item.description: The BRICS foreign ministers meeting in China was overshadowed by discussions of the Iran-Israel conflict.
